components.navigation: Sticky top bar or Bottom navigation for mobile. High contrast borders.
components.cards: Flat background, 1px border (#E2E8F0), no shadow by default, subtle shadow on hover.
components.buttons: Square or very slightly rounded (rounded-sm), strong contrast. Primary uses #0F172A text-white, Secondary uses bg-white border-slate-300.
components.forms: Shadcn form components. Inputs with border-slate-300, focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-900. Predefined select dropdowns for time blocks and order types.
components.tables: Dense rows, left-aligned for data, text-sm for better mobile fit. Horizontal scrolling if needed.

visual_enhancers.borders: Use grid-like borders to separate sections. Tactical minimalism.

pages.name: Dashboard
pages.description: Summary of pedagogical hours owed vs compensated. Large numeric displays.
pages.layout: Grid with 2 columns on mobile for stats, full width for recent activity.

pages.name: Registro de Clases
pages.description: Form to log teaching hours. Predefined time blocks (08:00-09:30, 09:50-11:20, 11:40-13:10, 14:30-16:00, 15:00-16:30, 16:45-18:15) + Option for 'Other'.

pages.name: Registro de Guardias
pages.description: Form to log 24h guards. Type selector (Weekday 20h, Weekend 32h). Predefined order type (O/E, O/R, O/C).
pages.layout: Vertical form layout with toggle/select for day type.

pages.name: Exportar
pages.description: View table of matches (classes to guards) and export to Word (.docx).
pages.layout: Data table with 'Export to Word' primary CTA.

accessibility_and_interactions.hover_states: Buttons must have explicit hover states (e.g. hover:bg-slate-800 hover:text-white).
accessibility_and_interactions.test_ids: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='log-class-submit-button', data-testid='dashboard-tab'). Use kebab-case, role-based.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the UI using Shadcn components (Card, Form, Input, Select, Table, Button, Tabs).
Since it's a mobile web app, ensure touch targets are large enough (min h-10 for inputs/buttons).
Use localStorage/IndexedDB for React web PWA to save data locally as requested (100% local, no login).
Implement logic for calculating hours. Weekday guard = 15 chron hrs = 20 ped hrs. Weekend guard = 24 chron hrs = 32 ped hrs.
For the Word export feature (.docx), use a library like 'docx' or 'html-docx-js'. Generate a table with: N.°, Fecha, Horario, Tiempos compensados, Modalidad.
Make sure all components are created as .js files, NOT .tsx.
Ensure the app works perfectly on mobile viewports (responsive classes: 100% width on mobile, max-w-md or max-w-lg container).
Do not overuse the card component; consider flat layouts with border dividers.
Spanish language strictly for all user-facing text.
Follow the Archetype 4 Light Theme: Tactical, clear, high-contrast, no gradients, flat colors, authoritative tone.
